commands.review_summary:
The branch parses user Docker bind destinations, skips conflicting read-only workspace skill mounts in shell and browser sandbox Docker args, and updates tests to expect user-bind precedence.

PR surface: Source +35, Tests +73. Total +108 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: no. live high-confidence reproduction was established. Source inspection shows current main appends custom binds before read-only skill mounts when reserved-target validation is bypassed, which can produce the duplicate Docker target path described by the linked issue.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human sandbox/security review is needed because the remaining blockers are a precedence decision and contributor-supplied live Docker proof, not routine code cleanup.
